QF.id: VI Functions of DP Account Opening_28

question.text: Minor correction in name on a demat account (spelling mistakes, abbreviation, expansion) requires 100% audit by:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The concurrent auditor must conduct 100 percent audit of all cases involving minor correction in name. **The Trap:** 'SEBI' doesn't audit individual name corrections — this is an internal control measure by the DP. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series III-A covers internal audit and concurrent audit requirements. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** 100% audit for ALL name corrections (even minor) prevents fraudulent changes. Minor corrections include: spelling fixes, name expansion, abbreviation, or adding middle name.
